forgot_password.title: Reset your password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgot_password.sent_description: If an account exists for that email, a reset link is on its way. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgot_password.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please try again in a little while.
forgot_password.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset_password.title: Choose a new password
reset_password.password_hint: Use at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
reset_password.success: Password updated! Redirecting to sign in…
reset_password.invalid_link: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

registration.card_description: Join {{tenant}} by subscribing to coop shares and ordering your first share-type variation.
registration.card_description_generic: Join us by subscribing to coop shares and ordering your first share-type variation.

step5_consents.title: Consents
step5_consents.subtitle: Please read and confirm each document below before continuing.
step5_consents.must_accept_all: Please confirm each document above before continuing.

step2.intro: We sent a verification code to <1>{{email}}</1>. Enter it below to confirm your email address.
step2.stub_notice: Stub: any value is accepted for now.

step3.intro: Becoming a member requires subscribing to at least one cooperative share. Please choose how many shares you would like to subscribe to.

step4.intro: Choose the share-type variation you would like to order. You can adjust this later from your member page.

step5.title: You're almost done!
step5.subtitle: Review the data below and submit your application. (Submission is a stub for now.)
step5.name: Name
step5.consent_post_partial: {{count}} consent(s) could not be recorded — staff can re-collect them later.

step6.password_too_short: The password must be at least 8 characters long.

apply.title: Apply for membership
apply.subtitle: Tell us a little about yourself. We'll review your application and get back to you.
apply.success_title: Thank you! We've received your application.
apply.success_description: We've sent you a confirmation email. Redirecting to sign in…
apply.message: Anything else you'd like to tell us?
apply.error: Your registration could not be completed. Please try again.

set_password.invalid_link: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one from an administrator.
set_password.success: Password set! Redirecting to sign in…
set_password.password_hint: Use at least 12 characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols.
set_password.error: Your password could not be set. Please try again.

two_factor.prompt_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
two_factor.recovery_hint: Lost your phone? Use one of your recovery codes instead.

step_up.title: Confirm your password
step_up.description: This action requires password confirmation for security. Please re-enter your password to continue.
step_up.failed: Password confirmation failed. Please try again.
